task_completion.description: Agent logged into the Magento Admin panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Magento Admin dashboard is visible, or the login screen is shown being filled with the provided admin credentials.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Search Terms management page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Search Terms' page is visible in the Magento Admin, typically accessed via Marketing > SEO & Search > Search Terms.

task_completion.description: Agent created a search term redirect for 'cheap laptops' to '/electronics.html' for 'All Store Views'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or grid showing the search query 'cheap laptops' with the redirect URL '/electronics.html' and Store set to 'All Store Views'. A success message like 'You saved the search term' may be visible.

task_completion.description: Agent created a search term redirect for 'gym equipment' to '/sports.html' for 'All Store Views'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or grid showing the search query 'gym equipment' with the redirect URL '/sports.html' and Store set to 'All Store Views'. A success message may be visible.

task_completion.description: Agent created a search term redirect for 'mens outfit' to '/clothing.html' for 'All Store Views'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or grid showing the search query 'mens outfit' with the redirect URL '/clothing.html' and Store set to 'All Store Views'. A success message may be visible.

integrity.description: Agent used the Magento Admin GUI to create the redirects.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and Magento Admin interface, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Magento store.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows a local Magento instance, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a database client or terminal to insert the records directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database management tools (like phpMyAdmin or MySQL CLI) are used to run SQL INSERT queries.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating 3 search term redirects in Magento: 'cheap laptops' -> '/electronics.html', 'gym equipment' -> '/sports.html', and 'mens outfit' -> '/clothing.html'. All must be set to 'All Store Views'. Admin credentials are admin / Admin1234!.
